title: Battle in the Ilum system
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Battle of Ilum}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Battle |prev=[[Invasion of Fondor]]''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]''—Imperial campaign, Mission 02 |conc= |next=[[Subjugation of Geonosis]]''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]''—Imperial campaign, Mission 04 |image=[[File:Schlacht_von_Ilum.jpg]] |name=Battle of Ilum |conflict=[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] |date=c. [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]]{{EaW_2BBY}} |place=Above [[Ilum/Legends|Ilum]]''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]''—Imperial campaign, Mission 03 |result=*[[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] [[Unidentified pirate leader (Ilum)|pirate leader]] captured and interrogated *Pirate forces above Ilum eradicated |side1=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] |side2=Black Sun |side3= |side4= |commanders1=[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] |commanders2=Pirate leader |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1= *1 [[Firespray-31-class patrol and attack craft/Legends|Firespray-31-class patrol and attack craft]] **[[Slave I/Legends|''Slave I'']] *[[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] *[[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]] *1 [[TIE Advanced x1/Legends|TIE Advanced x1]] *5 [[Tartan-class patrol cruiser|''Tartan''-class patrol cruisers]] *3 [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ships]] *1 [[Viper probe droid/Legends|Viper probe droid]] |forces2= *[[Rihkxyrk assault fighter|Rihkxyrk Assault Fighter]]s *1 [[Interceptor-class frigate/Legends|''Interceptor''-class frigate]] *1 [[Asteroid base]] |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=Light |casual2=All forces |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|The Empire is willing to pay a considerable fee for disposing of defenses orbiting Ilum.''"
"''Is my target one of the filthy pirates in that sector?''"
"''Your target is the defenses, the Imperial fleet will take care of the rest.|Darth Vader and Boba Fett|}} During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], a '''battle''' between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] in the [[Ilum system/Legends|Ilum system]] in an effort to discover the identity of an Imperial traitor who attempted to jeopardize the Empire's operations on [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferra]]. After the location of the pirates was confirmed by a [[Probe droid/Legends|probe droid]], the Empire hired the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] to scout out the pirate base and destroy their early warning systems. Fett succeeded in the task and an Imperial task force was brought in to attack the pirate asteroid base to root out the [[Unidentified pirate leader (Ilum)|leader]], who attempted to escape aboard an [[Interceptor-class frigate/Legends|''Interceptor''-class frigate]]. Eventually, however, the pirate ship was neutralized and boarded, and the leader was taken away to be interrogated. ==Prelude== {{Quote|Fondor has been subjugated. Have you intercepted any information about our traitor?''"
"''We have deciphered encoded transmissions which were redirected several times, but eventually routed to Ilum.''"
"''The pirates' den, no doubt. Send a probe droid to confirm this…infestation.|Darth Vader and a stormtrooper|}} When the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] invaded''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]''—Imperial campaign, Mission 01 the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferra]]—controlled by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]—the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] suspected that someone had warned the Rebels of their approach. [[Pirate/Legends|Pirate]] insignias found on Rebel equipment led Vader to the conclusion that the Alliance was co-operating with the pirates, trading information on Imperial [[Hyperspace route/Legends|cargo routes]] in exchange for supplies. However, his investigation was interrupted by the news of a Rebel [[Invasion of Fondor|uprising]] on the [[Starship/Legends|starship]]-producing world of [[Fondor/Legends|Fondor]]. Vader thus ordered his forces to eliminate the threat and recover any communications they discover. After the uprising was suppressed, the Empire intercepted coded transmissions that eventually led to the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ilum/Legends|Ilum]]. ==The battle== {{Quote|Do not overestimate your value to the Empire, Fett. But your services are required here. Our target is the pirate leader, and he will be taken alive.|Darth Vader to Boba Fett|}} [[File:Fett_illum.jpg|thumb|left|150px|[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] approaching the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] base.]] The planet had heavy defenses installed, so Vader hired [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] to use his stealth skills as the pilot of the [[Slave I/Legends|''Slave I'']] to slip through their defenses and destroy the sensor pods, allowing the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] to move in. With this done, the Imperial fleet was free to pursue the pirate leader, who tried to escape in his [[Interceptor-class frigate/Legends|Pirate interceptor cruiser]]. Boba Fett hit a blow to the pirate's engines before he could jump to [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], and the leader surrendered himself. ==Aftermath== {{Quote|Begin your interrogation immediately, Fett. This pirate may know the identity of the traitor we seek.|Darth Vader to Boba Fett|}} Their leader supplied the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] with more information on Moff Kalast. ==Behind the scenes== This battle was the third mission of the Imperial campaign in the [[2006]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]''. The strength and composition of the imperial force may vary at the player's wish, only the Probe droid and Slave I (Boba Fett's starship) are mandatory in this mission. Attaching Darth Vader (who pilots the TIE Advanced) to the imperial fleet is optional. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Empire at War'': Prima Official Game Guide]] {{1stm}} *[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption Expansion: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption Expansion'': Prima Official Game Guide]] ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{GCW 2 BBY}} {{Interlang |de=Schlacht von Ilum (0 VSY) |es=Batalla en el sistema Ilum }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Ilum system, battle in the}} [[Category:Battles of Ilum]] [[Category:Events of the Galactic Civil War]]
